atomicity.message: Staged payload is exactly the land-04 planning-round documentation unit: the binding 2026-07-02 D1-D12 decision record, the reviewed plan documents, the plans index, and the single docs index line for the new decision record. Later source, release, Beads, and unrelated documentation-refresh changes remain unstaged.

conditions.message: Prior lint-rules pass still holds. The delta touched only the decisions doc and orchestrator-experience plan; no lint-command or lintconfig surface changed, and the staged payload remains docs/plans only with a clean staged whitespace check.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status -> 11 staged docs/plans paths only; no source, config, or hook files added in the delta.
git diff --cached --stat -> 11 files changed, 2203 insertions(+), matching the delta packet's refreshed staged payload.
git diff --cached --check -> no output.

conditions.message: Prior DRY pass still holds. The delta rewrites text in two docs; inspected arrow-related sections show no duplicated implementation logic or divergent repeated procedure introduced by the refresh.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status -> delta remains inside docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md and plans/orchestrator-experience.md plus the same planned docs set.
git show :docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md | sed -n '138,145p' -> D10 is a single ordered prose workflow, not duplicated chains.
git show :plans/orchestrator-experience.md | sed -n '110,146p' -> option text and migration discussion use prose plus symlink notation; no duplicate code or command logic.

conditions.message: Delta refresh fixes my prior anti-reward-hacking failure. The D10 instructional bare-arrow workflow chain is gone; remaining arrows are the allowed quoted hazard example in D4 and symlink notation in the orchestrator plan.
evidence: git show :docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md | sed -n '138,145p' -> D10 now says 'The standing workflow, in order: first discuss; then write detailed Markdown plans...; then convert...; only then assign work to agents.' No '->' chain remains.

git show :docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md | rg -n -- '->|workflow|arrow|redirection' -> arrow occurrences are D4 quoted hazard example/rule lines 43-50 plus non-arrow D10 prose hit at line 142.

git show :plans/orchestrator-experience.md | rg -n -- '->|symlink|truth table|convert|orchestrator-mode' -> remaining '->' occurrences are 'CLAUDE.md -> AGENTS.md' symlink notation on lines 114 and 123; truth-table text uses prose, not arrows.

conditions.message: The refreshed staged land-04 payload remains planning/docs/index material only and contains no executable function or behavior implementation requiring nearby function-level test coverage under this condition.
evidence: Delta `git diff --cached --name-status` still showed only docs and plans paths: docs/README.md, docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md, plans/README.md, and eight plans/*.md files.
Delta `git diff --cached --stat` showed 11 Markdown docs/plans files and 2203 insertions, with no Go/source/runtime files staged.
Prior independent `go test ./...` passed before this docs-only delta; the delta touched only staged Markdown files.

conditions.message: Prior definition-of-done pass still holds. The delta does not weaken acceptance gates; D10 now states the planning workflow as ordered prose and the orchestrator plan still preserves review/deferred-bead boundaries.
evidence: git show :docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md | sed -n '138,145p' -> D10 states: discuss, write Markdown plans, convert to detailed beads, then assign work.
git show :plans/orchestrator-experience.md | rg -n -- 'truth table|orchestrator-mode|convert' -> migration truth-table work remains explicitly deferred/identified, not silently declared done.
git diff --cached --check -> no output.

conditions.message: Prior evidence-log pass still holds. The delta resolves the anti-reward-hacking wording defect without weakening evidence requirements or verifier independence.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status -> only docs/plans staged; no evidence tooling behavior changed in the delta.

git show :docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md | rg -n -- 'workflow|arrow|redirection' -> D4 preserves the quoted hazardous example and rule against bare arrow chains; D10 reference remains prose.
git diff --cached --check -> no output.

conditions.message: Prior scope-control pass still holds. Delta packet scoped the refresh to two staged docs, and the current staged payload remains the same 11 docs/plans files with no excluded staged paths observed.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status -> docs/README.md, docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md, plans/README.md, and eight added plan files only.
git diff --cached --stat -> 11 files changed, 2203 insertions(+).
git diff --cached --check -> no output.

conditions.message: Prior destructive-operations pass still holds. The only shell-sensitive delta was the arrow-chain fix; the remaining arrow chain in D4 is quoted as a hazard example, while D10 no longer contains a pasteable redirection chain.
evidence: git show :docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md | rg -n -- '->|workflow|arrow|redirection' -> remaining arrows are in D4 quoted hazard example and D4 rule; D10 has no arrow chain.
git show :docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md | sed -n '40,52p' -> D4 explicitly explains the shell redirection hazard and says bare arrow chains are a defect.
git show :docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md | sed -n '138,145p' -> D10 workflow is ordered prose.

conditions.message: The refreshed staged payload still creates durable decision and plan records and indexes them coherently; the two-file delta is staged, whitespace-clean, and does not introduce secret-like data patterns.
evidence: `git show :docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md | rg -n "D1|D2|D3|D4|D5|D6|D7|D8|D9|D10|D11|D12"` found all staged decision headings D1-D12 after the delta.

`git show :plans/README.md | rg -n "orchestration-goal-prompt|orchestrator-experience|land-working-set|release-v0.1.2|issue-17-guided-lint-setup|verifier-orchestration|bead-closure-mode|open-source-launch"` still found every staged plan indexed.
`git diff --cached --check` produced no output after the delta.
Staged-blob scan over `git diff --cached --name-only -- docs plans` found no `BEGIN PRIVATE`, AWS secret, token assignment, password, or api-key pattern.

conditions.message: Prior security-boundaries pass still holds. The delta is documentation-only, does not introduce secret-like staged paths, and the remaining arrows are documentation examples/symlink notation rather than executable security-sensitive instructions.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-only | rg -n -- '(^|/)(\.env|id_rsa|id_dsa|id_ed25519|secret|secrets|credential|credentials|token|tokens|key|keys)(\.|/|$)' -> no output (rg exit 1, no matching staged path).
git diff --cached --name-status -> only docs/ and plans/ paths staged.
git show :plans/orchestrator-experience.md | rg -n -- '->|symlink|truth table|convert|orchestrator-mode' -> remaining arrows are symlink notation only in the refreshed plan.

conditions.message: The refreshed staged payload still has no UI, browser, layout, screenshot, canvas, or visual-diff governed surface.
evidence: Delta `git diff --cached --name-status` listed only Markdown docs/plans changes and no frontend/UI/assets files.
The delta packet said only `docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md` and `plans/orchestrator-experience.md` were restaged; inspection confirmed remaining changes are Markdown text.

conditions.message: The refreshed staged payload remains docs-only and introduces no runtime path, benchmarked behavior, bundle, memory, token, cost, throughput, or latency surface governed by the performance-budget condition.
evidence: Delta `git diff --cached --stat` showed 11 Markdown docs/plans files and no source/runtime files staged.
The only delta-restaged files were `docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md` and `plans/orchestrator-experience.md`, both Markdown planning/decision docs.

conditions.message: The refreshed staged autonomy-policy surface still states independent-work boundaries, owner veto model, hard exceptions, and escalation points clearly rather than granting unbounded autonomy.
evidence: `git show :docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md | rg -n "D11|Hard exceptions|irreversible|outward-facing"` showed D11 and hard exceptions remain in the staged decision doc after the delta.

`git show :plans/orchestration-goal-prompt.md | rg -n "owner vetoes|Hard exceptions|irreversible|outward-facing|No fabricated evidence|never authorize|bypass|Immediate escalation"` showed owner veto after the fact, hard exceptions, no fabricated evidence, never authorizing no-verify/hook bypass/evidence fabrication, and escalation triggers still hold.
`git show :plans/README.md | rg -n "orchestration-goal-prompt|orchestrator-experience"` still shows the autonomy/orchestrator plans indexed rather than hidden in chat.
